_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Evaluate the effectiveness of procurement function in addressing information security requirements and supply chain risks through procurement activities and recommend improvements.
reference_document_element_description: Advise on data protection implications of new projects, systems, and processing activities, ensuring privacy considerations are integrated into design and procurement decisions before processing begins.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-013 (SP, cosine: 0.483), OP-T-008 (OP, cosine: 0.432).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.3/10 (raw 0.632). Shared vocabulary: [activities, procurement]. DCWF-only terms [addressing, chain, effectiveness, evaluate, function, improvements] vs WIDAI-only terms [advise, begins, considerations, data, decisions, design] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.887 (P=0.889, R=0.884). Balanced P/R — the 21-word DCWF element and 25-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Evaluate the effectiveness of procurement function in addressing information sec" and "Advise on data protection implications of new projects, systems, and processing" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.522 < STS 0.632 (gap -0.110). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [addressing, chain, effectiveness] and [advise, begins, considerations] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.5%. Shared tokens: [activities, procurement]. DCWF-only: [addressing, chain, effectiveness, evaluate, function, improvements]. WIDAI-only: [advise, begins, considerations, data, decisions, design].
